ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hieroglyphs" (
  "hieroglyph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hieroglyphic symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symbol */,
  "phonetic_value" TEXT /* Phonetic value of the symbol */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the symbol belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the symbol belongs to */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of symbol (e.g., logogram, phonogram) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the symbol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hieroglyph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hieroglyphs_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hieroglyphs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hieroglyph_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "hieroglyph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol the image represents */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, illustration) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hieroglyph_images_hieroglyph_id FOREIGN KEY ("hieroglyph_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hieroglyph_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "hieroglyph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol the video represents */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* Path to the video file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., explanation, demonstration) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hieroglyph_videos_hieroglyph_id FOREIGN KEY ("hieroglyph_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_hieroglyphs" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed the symbol */,
  "hieroglyph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol contributed */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was contributed */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., creation, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hieroglyphs_hieroglyph_id FOREIGN KEY ("hieroglyph_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hieroglyphs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed the image */,
  "hieroglyph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol the image represents */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_images_hieroglyph_id FOREIGN KEY ("hieroglyph_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed the video */,
  "hieroglyph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol the video represents */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* Path to the video file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_videos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_videos_hieroglyph_id FOREIGN KEY ("hieroglyph_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "symbol1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first hieroglyphic symbol in the relationship */,
  "symbol2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second hieroglyphic symbol in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synonym, antonym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_relationships_symbol1_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol1_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_relationships_symbol2_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol2_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_categories_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_subcategories_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES hieroglyphs ("hieroglyph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hieroglyphic_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_symbols" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic set */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol */,
  "set_order" INTEGER /* Order of the symbol within the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id", "symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hieroglyphic_texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "text_name" TEXT /* Name of the text */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* Content of the text */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translation of the text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_symbols" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic text */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hieroglyphic symbol */,
  "text_order" INTEGER /* Order of the symbol within the text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id", "symbol_id")
)
